items.title: Reject invalid experiment evidence before record append
items.verification_result: PASS: full 205-test suite and repository validation.
items.evidence: Focused RED proved missing metadata, missing events, malformed JSONL, and duplicate metadata keys could cross the append boundary before the fix.
items.next_gate: reopen on any evidence append regression

items.title: Do not license ASCS claims from unrelated events
items.verification_result: PASS: full 205-test suite and repository validation.
items.evidence: Pure-function RED showed no ASCS evidence and an allowed validation claim at the same time.

items.title: Honor allowManagedHooksOnly only in managed settings
items.verification_result: PASS: full 205-test suite and repository validation.
items.evidence: Doctor RED reproduced a false no-conflict result from a project-local managed-only key.
items.next_gate: reopen on any Doctor scope-precedence regression

items.title: Reject negative experiment metrics at the CLI boundary
items.verification_result: PASS: full 205-test suite and repository validation.
items.evidence: Experiment 004 and 005 parsers accepted negative missed-item and correction counts.
items.next_gate: reopen if any metric CLI accepts a negative count

items.title: Add an explicit paid-runtime cost gate to Experiment 005
items.verification_result: PASS: full 205-test suite and repository validation; no paid arm executed.
items.evidence: Experiment 004 stopped for resource sustainability while Experiment 005 had no budget ceiling.
items.next_gate: human approval before every paid arm

items.title: Machine-check the current implementation phase
items.verification_result: PASS: full 205-test suite and repository validation.
items.evidence: The historical phase plan described Doctor and Measurement as future work despite existing implementations.
items.next_gate: reopen if implementation status and executable assets drift

items.title: Narrow PostCompact risk to the remaining runtime binding
items.verification_result: PASS: documentation and repository validation; runtime smoke remains the next gate.
items.evidence: Current official hooks documentation confirms manual and auto PostCompact matchers.
items.next_gate: manual and auto compact runtime smoke before stable binding claim

items.title: Consolidate duplicated experiment helper infrastructure
items.verification_result: PASS: full 205-test suite including pair transaction failure injection.
items.evidence: Experiment 004 and 005 duplicated Git, hash, note parsing, and pair transaction behavior.
items.next_gate: reopen if experiment helpers diverge or transaction tests regress

items.title: Fail closed on installed upstream plugin version drift
items.verification_result: PASS: full 205-test suite and repository validation; real Doctor first rejected installed 1.0.3, then returned success after the explicitly approved user-scope update to reviewed 1.0.4.
items.evidence: The local Claude plugin inventory reported compact-plus 1.0.3 while the stable repository contract reviews 1.0.4, but Doctor previously reported the layer as enabled without qualification.
items.next_gate: manual and auto PostCompact runtime smoke under a separate paid-runtime approval

items.title: Attest reviewed compact-plus content instead of trusting SemVer alone
items.verification_result: PASS: full 205-test suite, repository validation, fixed-source/cache digest equality, and real Doctor exit 0.
items.evidence: Version-only Doctor checks could not detect same-version cache modification, and Claude installed_plugins.json retained the prior v1.0.3 gitCommitSha after updating to v1.0.4. The pinned v1.0.4 source and installed cache matched byte-for-byte across all 26 non-git files, so their deterministic tree digest is now the reviewed trust anchor.
items.verification: python3 -B -m unittest tests.test_ascs_doctor tests.test_validate_repo && python3 -B scripts/validate_repo.py --require-upstream-lock
items.next_gate: add a no-paid synthetic manual/auto marker smoke before any separately approved real Claude runtime smoke

items.title: Assetize a no-model manual/auto compact-plus recovery smoke
items.verification_result: PASS: full 205-test suite, repository validation, and installed reviewed compact-plus 1.0.4 synthetic manual/auto smoke.
items.evidence: Static registration and content checks did not execute the marker/recovery contract. The isolated synthetic smoke now proves marker creation, cooldown clearing, one-shot recovery injection, and summary non-reinjection for both triggers without invoking a model, API, or PreCompact hook.
items.verification: python3 -B -m unittest tests.test_compact_plus_smoke tests.test_ascs_doctor tests.test_validate_repo && python3 -B scripts/smoke_compact_plus.py && python3 -B scripts/validate_repo.py --require-upstream-lock
items.next_gate: real manual and auto Claude Code runtime dispatch smoke after manual authentication and separate paid-runtime approval

items.title: Exclude Claude runtime in-use markers from reviewed plugin content
items.verification_result: PASS: focused RED/GREEN, real Doctor exit 0, compact-plus synthetic smoke, full 219-test suite, and repository validation.
items.evidence: The real Doctor reproduced a false CONTENT MISMATCH because Claude Code added two root-level .in_use process markers to an otherwise byte-identical reviewed 1.0.4 cache. Experiment 006 narrowed the exclusion to numeric root-level .in_use/<pid> files while keeping lookalikes attested.
items.verification: python3 -B -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_ascs_doctor.py' && python3 -B plugins/ascs/scripts/ascs_doctor.py && python3 -B scripts/smoke_compact_plus.py
items.next_gate: reopen if any non-runtime cache content can evade or falsely fail attestation

items.title: Assetize a no-model Codex compact-hook subprocess smoke
items.verification_result: PASS: focused RED/GREEN, Codex subprocess smoke, full 219-test suite, repository validation, py_compile, and diff check; no Codex/model/API execution.
items.evidence: Module-level tests did not prove the checked-in hook's executable JSON stdin/stdout contract or preserve the manual/auto trigger in the receipt.
items.verification: python3 -B -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_codex_compact*.py' && python3 -B scripts/smoke_codex_compact.py && python3 -B scripts/validate_repo.py --require-upstream-lock
items.next_gate: real manual and auto Codex runtime dispatch smoke after separate paid-runtime and hook-trust approval

items.title: Synchronize acceptance, roadmap, test evidence, and historical reproduction docs
items.verification_result: PASS: full 219-test suite, repository validation, py_compile, and diff check.
items.evidence: The acceptance checklist remained wholly unchecked, the roadmap described implemented diagnostics as future work, and the historical dogfood reproduction command did not pin pxpipe 0.8.0.
items.next_gate: reopen when implementation status, acceptance evidence, or operational commands drift

items.title: Preserve and validate Codex state metadata after checkpoint writes
items.verification_result: PASS: Experiment 006 reproduced invalid state authoring; protocol wording, validator regression, full 219-test suite, and repository validation pass.
items.evidence: The treated Codex arm removed four required ascs-state-metadata blocks and left two placeholder envelopes. Useful recovery content survived, but live state trust failed. The drop-in protocol now requires exactly one complete envelope and a post-write state trust check.
items.verification: python3 -B -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_validate_repo.py' && python3 -B scripts/validate_repo.py --require-upstream-lock
items.next_gate: repeat a treated fixed-interruption case and require live check_state PASS before claiming protocol adherence
